_comment: Example of a complete Gemini response — use this to build the UI against

responses.summary: Supports overnight security after recent thefts made residents feel unsafe.
Opposes a full-time guard because fees are high and cameras may be enough.

camps.label: Pro-Security
camps.position: Wants stronger overnight protection in the building.
representative_quotes: My apartment was broken into last month.

camps.label: Cost-Conscious
camps.position: Opposes higher fees for extra security.
representative_quotes: We already pay too much each month.

compromise.summary: Try a night-shift guard with a lower-cost shared fee model.
compromise.details: Hire one guard for overnight hours and upgrade cameras for daytime coverage. Run a 3-month trial before renewing.

addresses.how_addressed: Adds coverage during the main safety concern window.
Keeps costs lower than 24/7 staffing and stays reversible.
